properties.name: Briarcliff West
properties._SEED_APPROXIMATE: This is an approximate starter boundary so the listing watcher works on day one. It is a rough rectangle around the Briarcliff West street cluster (Mulberry / Hickory / Holly / Pointe / Briar Point / Wildwood / Briarcliff / 43rd-47th / Belleview) and MAY still include some Claymont parcels. To tighten it: open the map, use the freeform-polygon draw tool to trace the real Briarcliff West edge, export the GeoJSON, and replace the coordinates below. check_listings.py reads the first (outer) ring of this polygon.
